# Remi

> Remi is an AI teammate for owner-run small businesses. She watches your
> inbox and books, flags unpaid invoices and unanswered quotes, and drafts
> the follow-ups for your approval. Nothing goes out without your say-so,
> and every action comes with a receipt. Pro is $99/month, Scale is
> $199/month, with a 7-day trial at remi.new.

Remi is built for owner-led service businesses (1 to 15 people) where the
owner does the work and chases the money: contractors, remodelers, home
services, agencies, consultancies, and similar.

## Pages

- [Home](https://remi.new/): what Remi does and how to get started
- [Blog](https://remi.new/blog): practical guides on getting paid, quote
  follow-up, and running the money side of an owner-run business
- [Case Studies](https://remi.new/case-studies): how owners use Remi
- [Get Started](https://remi.new/qualify/contact): connect your inbox and
  see what's slipping through it

## Feeds

- [RSS](https://remi.new/rss.xml)
- [Sitemap](https://remi.new/sitemap.xml)
